note: RP2350 + FPGA teensy-form-factor board by Adiuvo Engineering (published in the forgix_public Bitbucket repo as a zip); 6 copper layers, BGA-class fanout, board outline embedded in a footprint (prep rebuilds it at board level).

nRF52840 in a RAW AQFN-73-1EP 7x7mm P0.5mm footprint (not a module) -- the interior-pad geometry qfn_fanout's center-pad path targets (#410/PR433). 73 signal/power pins on two perimeter rings (edge-fan escaped); the central exposed pad is drawn as a 4x4 grid of thermal sub-pads plus the GND EP, so the center-pad underpad escape is exercised by the realistic 'via-drop the GND EP with --nets GND --escape-method underpad --allow-via-in-pad' thermal-stitch case. 4 copper layers, 67 footprints, KiCad v8 (20240108). One off-board fp (within curation tolerance).
